author: danitiate
description: Quickly clean up temporary list-items with the press of a button

manifest.author: Danitiate
manifest.description: Quickly clean up temporary list-items with the press of a button
manifest.name: Check and Delete

name: Check and Delete

releases.author: Danitiate
releases.description:
- Fix issue where internal links and anchor elements would not be deleted in preview.
- Fix issue where if user deleted a line with the same ending as another check-and-delete line, both would be deleted.
    **This doesn't fix the issue where multiple lines are deleted if they contain the same text (multiple lines can be deleted if they are equal in content)**


Pull Request
#3

releases.author: Danitiate
releases.description:
Fixed minor issues:

- OnEnter adds one space too many
- Clicking "home" should put the cursor after the widget
- Clicking can be a bit tricky and can take up to 3 clicks before reacting
- Widget is not centered vertically
- Button is not rendered if it is child element of a regular list item

Pull Requests
#1 
#2

releases.author: Danitiate
releases.description:
Minor changes:
- Updated project description
- Use `vault.process` instead of `vault.read`

releases.author: Danitiate
releases.description:
Release version 1.0.1:
- Updated logic surrounding enabling / disabling source mode
    - Performance improvements
    - Fix issue where check-and-delete button would not render until user triggered `update()` function after disabling source mode
